hero.description: Stop wrestling with complex BI tools. AtlasBI turns raw data into stunning, board-ready visualizations instantly. The fastest way to share insights and make data-driven decisions with your team.

features.description: Everything you need to turn raw data into professional insights in seconds.

teams.title: Built for every team and workflow
teams.description: AtlasBI empowers everyone—from startups to enterprises—to find insights in their data instantly.

comparison.title: Why AtlasBI?
comparison.description: Traditional BI tools were built for data analysts. AtlasBI is built for the entire team.

traditional_features.title: Steep learning curve
traditional_features.desc: Requires technical training and manual setup for every dashboard.

traditional_features.title: Siloed data prep
traditional_features.desc: Data must be cleaned and structured manually before visualization.

traditional_features.title: Static reports
traditional_features.desc: Dashboards often require manual refreshes and aren't live-collaborative.

traditional_features.title: High analyst dependency
traditional_features.desc: Teams wait days for analysts to build or update specific views.

traditional_features.title: Generic design aesthetics
traditional_features.desc: Standard charts that require extra tools for presentation-ready quality.

traditional_features.title: Fragmented file sharing
traditional_features.desc: Sharing requires exporting PDFs or sending large, static files.

atlas_features.title: Zero learning curve
atlas_features.desc: Build professional charts instantly using natural language prompts.

atlas_features.title: Autonomous data prep
atlas_features.desc: AI automatically summarizes, cleans, and structures your datasets.

atlas_features.title: Live collaboration
atlas_features.desc: Every dashboard is live and collaborative by default for your entire team.

atlas_features.title: Instant self-serve insights
atlas_features.desc: Anyone can get answers in seconds without waiting for a data team.

atlas_features.title: Studio-grade visual polish
atlas_features.desc: Presentation-ready aesthetics out of the box, no extra design work needed.

atlas_features.title: Real-time collaborative links
atlas_features.desc: Share live, interactive links that stay updated as your data changes.

video.description: AtlasBI brings together everything data teams need. Connect your data sources. Build and share professional charts with your team. Audit datasets for accuracy. Generate new insights with AI chat. All in one clean, fast workspace.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start for free and scale your visualizations as your data grows. No hidden fees.
